action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 achieved 69.19% accuracy with the cleaned-label model, which is worse than the 72.67% best from the raw-noise 30-epoch ConvNeXt Tiny (iter 4). The cleaned model likely suffered from cleanlab mis-corrections or overfitting to the newly introduced labels. We have only ~89 minutes left—too tight for a full 30-epoch retraining run. Analysis: Ensembling the two diverse checkpoints (raw best 72.67% and cleaned best 69.19%) should reduce variance and potentially boost accuracy because they were trained on different label distributions and make partially uncorrelated errors. No training time is required. Decision: Update predict.py to load both best checkpoints and average their logits (with horizontal-flip TTA), test locally, then submit eval.
